settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences
settings.appearanceDescription: Customize the appearance of the app
settings.avatarDescription: Click to upload a new avatar
settings.avatarHint: Recommended: 200x200 pixels, JPG, PNG, GIF format
settings.emailVerificationCode: Verify the new email before saving
settings.emailVerificationRequired: Please send and enter the verification code before saving.
settings.changePasswordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure
settings.setPasswordDescription: Set a password for your account to enable password login
settings.newPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all data
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all your data will be permanently deleted.
settings.themeSettingsDescription: Adjust the appearance and layout to suit your preferences.
settings.themeDescription: Select the theme for the dashboard
settings.yourApiKeysDescription: API keys allow you to access the API programmatically
settings.noApiKeys: You don't have any API keys yet
settings.createFirstKey: Create your first API key to get started
settings.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
settings.twoFactorAuthDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account
settings.disableTwoFactorConfirm: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication? This will make your account less secure.
